title: Lance of Longinus
wikitext:
[]: Lance of Longinus             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Aug 27, 2006 12:06 am okay... i was watching ep 14 to get the evidence to show a guy in this thread http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1641 that Rei 1 is inside Unit 00...and right at the end....Rei 2 is carrying the lance...so does this means that the lance wasnt in there until then?...

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Sun Aug 27, 2006 12:10 am yes. IIRC they stabbed her to stop regeneration they actually found the lance in the white moon:

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Aug 27, 2006 12:23 am woah...is that from Directors cut???...i dont have those... where is that from???...i nevewr heard anything as to where Lilith comes from...whats the white moon??? is that the place in Antartica where they found Adam?...does mean they were found together? that pic does show how they know the Lance will stop her... but if it takes like three seconds for her body to regenerate...sept the knees cuz Rei is made of Lilith...why in the world wouldnt her body be past the torso by the time they put it in...why was it even out of her in the first place?

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Sun Aug 27, 2006 12:43 am this pic is a cap from the test type opening, a second opening with the full cruel angel's thesis song and some extra pics where you can download it here [url]http://www.evamonkey.com/em_omake.php[/url] in the pic, it is adam on the white moon found in antarctika by the katsuragi expedition team. Lilith was found in black moon (aka geofront) and that's where it is in the series as for the regeneration.............i'm not very aware :mrgreen: they took the Lance out of Lilith's body in order to destroy Arael, the 15th Angel

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Aug 27, 2006 12:51 am Six Winged Angel wrote: Lilith was found in white moon (aka geafront) and that's where it is in the series as for the regeneration.............i'm not very aware :mrgreen: they took the Lance out of Lilith's body in order to destroy Arael, the 15th Angel

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Sun Aug 27, 2006 12:54 am yes i mean black moon (rush)

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Aug 27, 2006 2:39 am But i know they take it out to beat Arael i mean why was it out of anything before ep 14 when Rei pu it in Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Sun Aug 27, 2006 2:45 am Earlier in the series (I think it was 12) they show Gendo and Fuyutsuki at the South Pole transporting the Lance back to NERV. I don't know why it was there, or how they managed to subvert Lilith without it before that; my knowledge is as much piecemeal as is yours. And by proof in 14 that Rei I's soul is in Unit 00, do you mean her attempt at attacking Ritsuko?

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Aug 27, 2006 3:16 am ...Timstuff still thinks Naoko is inside Unit 00...so the Ritsuko thing is to prove that it be dumb for Naoko to attack her... also in the same ep...Shinji sees Rei inside the Eva...right at the end he sees the freaky convoluted Rei that we see again in ep 25...which i identified in the script as Rei 1 i think i should sic Reichu or Mr. Tines on em...whatcha think?

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Sun Aug 27, 2006 3:33 am The weird vision of the overhead perspective of Rei (with the distorted head and creepy smile) isn't really literal or anything; it's just a weird and spooky perception/caricature of her to indicate that something is wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 27, 2006 12:13 pm Keep your thread on-topic, 0rolando. zeaven wrote: Earlier in the series (I think it was 12) they show Gendo and Fuyutsuki at the South Pole transporting the Lance back to NERV. I don't know why it was there

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Aug 27, 2006 1:32 pm :shock: thats a lot of reading... oh boy... :shock: well...here goes nothin :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Aug 29, 2006 9:31 pm ok about the whole lilith thing how did they get the lance in her in the 1st place they didnt have the eva's back then so how did that happen?

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Tue Aug 29, 2006 9:50 pm that musta been one helluva crane...that is a good question...perhaps they shot it through a cannon but then again...look here [URL=http://serv1.imagehigh.com/view.php?id=3711969_vlcsnap-440273.png&path=/imgss] [/URL] [URL=http://serv1.imagehigh.com/view.php?id=3711973_vlcsnap-447971.png&path=/imgss] [/URL] [URL=http://serv1.imagehigh.com/view.php?id=3711974_vlcsnap-440724.png&path=/imgss] [/URL] shes alread nailed...but no spear...maybe Evas were working the first time they shoved it in @Reichu...how could you say 0rolando...i am Master0Rolando...silly

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Aug 29, 2006 11:20 pm That's Lilith and Eva-01. The Lance doesn't go into Lilith until 2015.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Aug 29, 2006 11:54 pm so ur saying Lilith just "appeared" on the cross that makes no sense if the lance was in her when she 1st showed up, but taken out, then put bak in in 2015, then...IM CONFUSED!!!!! 1 thing i never understood if unit 1 is Shinji's mom and unit 2 is Asuka's mom then who the hell is unit 0 yes i have read up there saying its Ritsuko's mom but that makes no sense plz explain

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Aug 30, 2006 2:40 am Rei 1 is in Unit 00 Yes Yui is in Unit 01 and yes Unit 02 is Asuka's mother... anyway...maybe she was on the cross when they found her...think about this... after Lilith apparently did the nasty with Sammael...(or does it just say demons) anyway...Yaweh punished her by having her babies die everytime a dude jerks one out... it has occured to me that the cross is a sort of punishment fit for an agel or divine figure (like Jesus maybe...)...since its the most painful punishment we have...Gods punishments must be hell...therefore Godly punishment = cross... so perhaps thats how she was aniled there...the simply moved the cross with her on it

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Aug 30, 2006 9:33 pm kool thx heres something stupid! y'kno how the angels r after Adam to cause the 3rd impact right? well then wat the hell were angel 3,4 and 5 doing? that was b4 Kaji brought Adam to nerv and thats y the 6th angel attacked unit 2 (or so they thought) so really? wat the hell were angel 3,4 and 5 doing?

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Wed Aug 30, 2006 9:46 pm The Angels are trying to come into contact with Lilith. The only reason people think they're trying to merge with Adam is because they believe the giant on the cross is Adam (and the reason that story was concocted was to hide the truth behind Second Impact and make people continue to believe that it had been caused by contact between Adam and an Angel).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 30, 2006 11:39 pm O-ho-ho, what about this? teh Classified Information wrote: 6. Special Agency Nerv D. In-Depth Information Nerv Headquarters was constructed inside the Black Moon containing Lilith. The Angels are all heading for Nerv H.Q. so that they can make contact with Lilith, the white giant in Terminal Dogma. They were aiming for her from the start, not Adam. 15. Angel D. In-Depth Information Two Seeds of Life cannot exist on one planet, and, therefore, one of them is excluded. As recorded in the Secret Dead Sea Scrolls, Adam-based life took part in a contest of survival, putting the stakes on their own existence. Some of them were trying to access Lilith and reset all life, some of them had nothing in mind, and some were trying to recover their progenitor Adam. The Angels -- Adam-based life -- became active under their respective tactics for survival and success.
